description: Curated subset of worked QCN query examples from the synthetic H3/H4 de-risking pipeline (method_out.json datasets array). Each example carries the gold relation plus FULL/NAIVE/OFF baseline predictions; metadata_* fields record family, hop-length L or redundancy K, recall, and outcome.

examples.input: Qualitative temporal constraint network (convex point algebra; nodes x0..x2 on a timeline). Reader-emitted relations at recall=1.0: x0 <= x1; x1 <= x2. Query: the relation between x0 and x2? (< before, = same, > after, ? unknown)

Qualitative temporal constraint network (convex point algebra; nodes x0..x2 on a timeline). Reader-emitted relations at recall=1.0: x0 < x1; x1 <= x2. Query: the relation between x0 and x2? (< before, = same, > after, ? unknown)
